prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-MINPOCKKNV-LOGO-GRN-FBA
Product Type: MULTITOOL
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Small Pocket Knife Multi Tool - LOGO (Green)
Description: Featuring a nail file and nail cleaner, knife blade, scissors and keyring, this ASR Outdoor mini pocket knife is ready for adventure. Great for camping, to carry as an EDC multitool, to include with a bug out bag, survival gear or an emergency preparedness kit, this little pocket knife does it all.Compact and lightweight, the multitool pocket knife weights under a pound and measures just 2.25 inches when closed. Easy to open, the milled finger groove allows for ease of use with the manual opening mechanism; use your finger to open both blades and accessories. Whether you're fishing, hunting, backpacking, camping or prepping gear for an outdoor survival or emergency preparedness kit, include this mini ASR Outdoor pocket knife to have alongside you on your next outdoor excursion; each tool locks in place for consistent, efficient and reliable performance, and it will never ask you to sacrifice on weight or space.With the included keychain ring incorporated into the design, you can attach the pocket knife multitool to just about anything you need: backpack, wallet, belt loop camping gear and much more, depending on where work or your next camping trip or hike takes you.Available Colors: Black, Red, Blue, Green
Search Terms: mini knives mens stocking stuffer cheap gift small pocket knife edc carry key chain mini knife for campers hunting small camping survival corkscrews nail files travel emergency prep
Features:
- 5 in 1 SMALL EDC POCKET KNIFE: Featuring a tweezer, toothpick nail file, knife blade, scissors and keyring, this ASR Outdoor mini pocket knife is ready for adventure; great for camping and every day carry on your key ring
- COMPACT DESIGN: Small pocket knife is just 2.25 inches overall when closed; super lightweight you'll never sacrifice on space or weight
- TASK READY: Whether you're fishing, hunting, backpacking, camping or prepping gear for an outdoor survival or emergency preparedness kit, this mini ASR Outdoor pocket knife is a great holiday gift idea for mens stocking stuffers
- KEYCHAIN POCKET KNIFE: With an included keychain ring incorporated into the design, you can attach the mini pocket knife multitool to just about anything you need: backpack, camping gear, keys and much more
- SPECIFICATIONS: Blade Length: 1.5 inch; Closed Length: 2.25 inch; Open Length: 5.5 inch; Color: Green; Material: Plastic, Metal; No assembly required

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Mini Green Pocket Knife Multitool

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Green Mini EDC Pocket Knife Multi Tool

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5-In-1 EDC, Keychain Design, 225In Closed, Camping And Survival Gear

openai.title_differentiation: 5 In 1 EDC Utility, Tweezer And Toothpick, Nail File, Scissors, Keyring, 225 Inch Closed, Lightweight
